about.description: A workspace for managing, processing, and exporting music score PDFs with OCR-based instrument recognition.
about.projectManagementDesc: PDFs are organized by project and collected for further processing.
about.ocrRecognitionDesc: Instruments are automatically recognized from sheet music and prepared for export.
about.batchExportDesc: Cropping, rotation, processing, and output run through a traceable job workflow.
about.multiLanguageDesc: Instrument names can be output in different languages for filenames and result lists.
about.workflowDesc: The typical process within the application.
about.step1Desc: A musical piece or movement is created as a project and serves as a container for all related PDFs.
about.step2Desc: Multiple PDFs can be uploaded collectively and then further edited within the project.
about.step3Desc: Rotation, cropping, split, and target language are set to match the material.
about.step4Desc: Recognized instruments can be checked, corrected, and then finalized collectively.
about.techDesc: The app combines a React frontend with a Python backend for PDF and OCR processing.

projects.newProjectDesc: Create a new project (e.g. the name of the musical piece) to upload scores and have them processed automatically in a batch.
projects.placeholder: e.g. Aida, Stars and Stripes, etc.
projects.deleteConfirm: Do you really want to delete the project "{{name}}"?

files.empty: No files available. Add new PDFs to process them further.

upload.title: Upload new PDFs
upload.description: Drag files here or select them manually.
upload.dragDrop: Add PDFs via drag and drop
upload.multipleAllowed: Multiple files are possible. Already selected files remain in the queue.

rotation.description: Rotate the score to an upright position. For better performance, only page 1 is shown here.
rotation.splitA3: Split PDF in the middle (e.g. A3 → 2x A4)

crop.instruction: Drag the area you want to keep with the mouse (everything outside will be cropped).
crop.a4Info: The blue rectangle represents the final A4 page. All scores in your project are overlaid for comparison.
crop.loading: Loading preview with all overlaid score sheets...

export.title: Export settings
export.deskewDesc: Automatically straightens crooked scanned scores. Works best when the skew is not too extreme.
export.contrastDesc: Automatically improves the contrast of scanned scores. Works best when scores are slightly faded or unevenly lit.
export.removeWhitePagesDesc: Skips pages that contain (almost) no black pixels (notes).
export.bgNoteDesc: Documents are processed in the background including text recognition. Instrument assignment can be done afterwards.

jobDetail.outputLanguageDesc: In this language, the instruments will be output for filenames.
jobDetail.previewSettingsDesc: Settings for the preview images to better assign instruments.
jobDetail.duplicateNamesDesc: Multiple entries result in the same export filename. Please adjust instrument, voice, or key for these files to ensure they are unique.

mapping.title: Instruments
mapping.description: Here you can edit the mapping of OCR-recognized search terms to the corresponding instrument names.

common.notFound: The page you are looking for does not exist.
